signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2%, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecast | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][3]
